<p>Did you know that your mobile phone&#8217;s camera has the power to capture stunning high-resolution photos just like a DSLR? If you don’t, my friend trusts me there is a mod application named <strong>LMC 8.4</strong>, that allows you to experience some pro features of <a href="https://lmc84.com.in/gcam-lmc-8-4-download-to-config-file-setup/">Gcam</a> for free. Using this camera app, you can turn your old mobile into a DSLR-like camera device and the most important thing is that you don&#8217;t have to pay any money for it.</p>

<p>I've been capturing moments as a mobile photographer for a decade now. Throughout this incredible journey, I've experimented with countless mod applications to elevate my camera quality. Unfortunately, none of them managed to capture the essence that I was looking for.</p>



<p>One day a well-reputed mobile photographer recommended it to me and from that moment, everything changed. It unlocks a new chapter in my photographic journey.</p>



<p>I promise that if you stick with this article until the end, you'll be able to download and install it on your device easily. After that, you can also use it effortlessly to capture photos or videos without facing any difficulties.</p>



<p>So, without wasting that much time let's start this professional mobile photography journey with the <strong>LMC </strong>app together.</p>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-column kadence-column14_aac508-1e kb-section-has-overlay"><div class="kt-inside-inner-col">
<h2 class="wp-block-heading" style="font-size:36px">What is <mark style="background-color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);color:#ffc100" class="has-inline-color">LMC 8.4</mark> APK?</h2>



<p><strong>LMC 8.4 </strong>is a special app that upgrades your phone's camera and makes it super easy for you to take amazing photos that look like they were done by a pro. </p>



<p>This camera application was created by a developer named Hasli, who is very famous in the tech world for creating such camera applications.</p>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-image kb-image14_920313-6e"><figure class="aligncenter size-medium"><noscript><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="300" height="265" src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-300x265.webp" alt="" class="kb-img wp-image-21" srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-300x265.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-1024x904.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-768x678.webp 768w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile.webp 1269w" sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" /></noscript><img fetchpriority="high" decoding="async" width="300" height="265" src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20300%20265%22%3E%3C/svg%3E' data-src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-300x265.webp" alt="" class=" lazy  kb-img wp-image-21"  data-srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-300x265.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-1024x904.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile-768x678.webp 768w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/03/lmc-8.4-download-mobile.webp 1269w"  data-sizes="(max-width: 300px) 100vw, 300px" /></figure></div>



<p>Every time, it's there to assist you in capturing those precious moments that you'll never want to forget. It brings some amazing features like Astrophotography Mode, HDR+, Night Sight, and lots more.</p>



<p>The biggest benefit of the LMC 8.4 application is that it does not contain ads and is completely free to download. Moreover, I have personally checked all the mobile phones, so they are compatible.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" style="font-size:36px">How to Use LMC 8.4 to Capture Images?</h2>

<p>You cannot imagine how easy it is to use this LMC app. There are no complicated buttons, so even if you’re a beginner with some basic knowledge, you can operate it effortlessly.</p>



<p>Below, I am sharing the easiest way to use this app. You won’t encounter any problems if you follow these steps.</p>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-iconlist kt-svg-icon-list-items kt-svg-icon-list-items14_1ef2aa-60 kt-svg-icon-list-columns-1 alignnone kt-list-icon-aligntop"><ul class="kt-svg-icon-list">
<li class="wp-block-kadence-listitem kt-svg-icon-list-item-wrap kt-svg-icon-list-item-14_ed5f8b-b8"><span class="kb-svg-icon-wrap kb-svg-icon-fe_checkCircle kt-svg-icon-list-single"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"  fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"  aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg></span><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text"><strong>Step 1:</strong>&nbsp;First, you need to download this app from the website <strong><mark style="background-color:rgba(0, 0, 0, 0);color:#fff300" class="has-inline-color">(lmc84.com.in</mark></strong>) and install it on your device.</span></li>



<li class="wp-block-kadence-listitem kt-svg-icon-list-item-wrap kt-svg-icon-list-item-14_5f43bd-90"><span class="kb-svg-icon-wrap kb-svg-icon-fe_checkCircle kt-svg-icon-list-single"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"  fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"  aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg></span><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text"><strong>Step 2:</strong>&nbsp;After installing and opening the app, you will see different modes. You need to select your desired mode, which can be a portrait, night sight, slow motion, or any other mode you want for taking photos. You can easily change the mode by swiping left or right on the screen.</span></li>



<li class="wp-block-kadence-listitem kt-svg-icon-list-item-wrap kt-svg-icon-list-item-14_4750a7-bf"><span class="kb-svg-icon-wrap kb-svg-icon-fe_checkCircle kt-svg-icon-list-single"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"  fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"  aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg></span><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text"><strong>Step 3:</strong>&nbsp;After selecting your desired mode, you need to open the settings included in that mode (for example, Portrait) and adjust some settings like face retouching, HDR+, timer, and the image ratio to get the desired images.</span></li>



<li class="wp-block-kadence-listitem kt-svg-icon-list-item-wrap kt-svg-icon-list-item-14_984f2f-8c"><span class="kb-svg-icon-wrap kb-svg-icon-fe_checkCircle kt-svg-icon-list-single"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24"  fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg"  aria-hidden="true"><path d="M22 11.08V12a10 10 0 1 1-5.93-9.14"/><polyline points="22 4 12 14.01 9 11.01"/></svg></span><span class="kt-svg-icon-list-text"><strong>Step 4:</strong>&nbsp;Next, you can apply the configuration files that you previously downloaded and connected to the app in order to improve the quality of your photos.</span></li>
</ul></div>



<p>Then take as many photos as you want and share your photography with the world.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" style="font-size:36px">Why LMC 8.4 is Better Than Stock Camera?</h2>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-image kb-image14_18e4c2-84"><figure class="aligncenter size-full"><noscript><img decoding="async" width="1280" height="720" src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera.webp" alt="" class="kb-img wp-image-126" srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera.webp 1280w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-300x169.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-1024x576.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-768x432.webp 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px" /></noscript><img decoding="async" width="1280" height="720" src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%201280%20720%22%3E%3C/svg%3E' data-src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera.webp" alt="" class=" lazy  kb-img wp-image-126"  data-srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera.webp 1280w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-300x169.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-1024x576.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Why-LMC-8.4-is-Better-Than-Stock-Camera-768x432.webp 768w"  data-sizes="(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px" /></figure></div>



<p>This camera is way cooler than the basic stock camera because it comes with extra features that give you even more options to play with. Below I provide those additional features that this app provides. </p>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-iconlist kt-svg-icon-list-items kt-svg-icon-list-items14_ea1993-29 kt-svg-icon-list-columns-1 alignnone kt-list-icon-aligntop"><ul class="kt-svg-icon-list">

<p>I hope this gives you a clearer picture of whether it's better than the stock camera or not.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" style="font-size:36px">Pro Tips for Becoming a Mobile Photographer with LMC</h2>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-image kb-image14_4fbdf2-1a"><figure class="aligncenter size-full"><noscript><img decoding="async" width="1280" height="720" src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC.webp" alt="" class="kb-img wp-image-128" srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC.webp 1280w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-300x169.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-1024x576.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-768x432.webp 768w" sizes="(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px" /></noscript><img decoding="async" width="1280" height="720" src='data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%201280%20720%22%3E%3C/svg%3E' data-src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC.webp" alt="" class=" lazy  kb-img wp-image-128"  data-srcset="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC.webp 1280w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-300x169.webp 300w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-1024x576.webp 1024w, https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/uploads/2024/04/Pro-Tips-for-Becoming-a-Mobile-Photographer-with-LMC-768x432.webp 768w"  data-sizes="(max-width: 1280px) 100vw, 1280px" /></figure></div>



<p>I'm a professional mobile photographer with years of experience capturing moments, and honestly, I rely on this app for my photography. If you aspire to reach my level and enhance your creativity by capturing stunning photos with this app, then carefully read the tips I've provided below.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_7b115d-3e wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_7b115d-3e"><strong>Tips 1: Explore the Settings</strong></h3>



<p>To become a professional photographer using the LMC app, you need to thoroughly understand its settings. In my opinion, it's essential to change the settings of this app repeatedly and keep taking photos with the adjusted settings until you find the ones that suit your preferences.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_4428be-a7 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_4428be-a7"><strong>Tips 2: Experiment with Filters</strong></h3>



<p>The app provides a variety of filters for free. In my opinion, you should utilize all those filters to capture photos every day and try to understand which filters to use to adjust the photo and enhance its greatness according to the background light conditions.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_d14800-39 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_d14800-39"><strong>Tips 3: Learn about Light Conditions</strong></h3>



<p>To become a professional mobile photographer, you need to know the proper use of light.&nbsp;Aim to shoot in natural light whenever possible, and learn how to position your subject in various locations to use light best.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_7dbb48-64 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_7dbb48-64"><strong>Tips 4: Always Try to Tell a Story Through Your Photo</strong></h3>



<p>A photographer’s photos should speak for themselves. So, if you want to be a good photographer, there must be meaning behind your photos. Start taking photos in a way where each one tells a story. Once you do that, no one can stop you from becoming a good or even professional photographer.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_ef2739-94 wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_ef2739-94"><strong>Tips 5: Find the Perfect Angles</strong></h3>



<p>In photography, like in everything else, angles are very important. This is because the angle of a photo determines its purpose and meaning. For example, if you take a low-angle shot of a baby looking up at a mango tree, it symbolizes that the baby wants the mangoes. On the other hand, if you take it from a mid-angle, it becomes just a basic photo of the baby and the tree. So, I hope you understand how important angles are.</p>



<h3 class="kt-adv-heading14_c7861d-8c wp-block-kadence-advancedheading" data-kb-block="kb-adv-heading14_c7861d-8c"><strong>Tips 6: Take Photos Regularly</strong></h3>



<p>You have to take photos regularly using this app. Taking photos regularly will train your muscle memory, which will take your photography skills to another level. For me, daily practice is the real secret to becoming a professional mobile photographer.</p>



<p>If you follow these few steps very well then no one can stop you from becoming a professional mobile photographer using this LMC app.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" style="font-size:36px">Set Up Config File (XML File) in LMC 8.4</h2>



<p>Just downloading the APK is not enough because it has no such features, so we need to add <a href="https://lmc84.com.in/gcam-lmc-8-4-download-to-config-file-setup/" data-type="link" data-id="https://lmc84.com.in/gcam-lmc-8-4-download-to-config-file-setup/">config&nbsp;files</a>&nbsp;to&nbsp;it. We have added various config files below, you can download them&nbsp;from&nbsp;there.</p>



<p>Let's see how we set up the config files in this beautiful camera&nbsp;APK.</p>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-iconlist kt-svg-icon-list-items kt-svg-icon-list-items14_d40bbe-fb kt-svg-icon-list-columns-1 alignnone"><ul class="kt-svg-icon-list">

Scroll a little bit to get those.</span></li>
</ul></div>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" style="font-size:36px">How to Fix the Frequent Crashing Issue with LMC 8.4 APK?</h2>



<p>I've been using this apk for a long time now, and during this journey, I've faced various issues while using it. This app generally works properly but one big problem is that it crashes a lot.</p>



<p>To resolve this problem, I researched a little, and after spending hours, I discovered a simple but effective procedure to <a href="https://lmc84.com.in/top-5-fixes-to-resolve-lmc-8-4-apk-crashing-issues/" data-type="link" data-id="https://lmc84.com.in/top-5-fixes-to-resolve-lmc-8-4-apk-crashing-issues/">resolve this problem</a> easily. I've provided a detailed instruction below to assist you. I hope this helps.</p>



<ul class="wp-block-list">
<li><strong>Step 1: </strong>To resolve this problem, first Open your phone's <strong>"Settings"</strong>.</li>



<li><strong>Step 2:</strong> Now tap on <strong>"Apps"</strong> and then choose<strong> "App Management"</strong>.</li>



<li><strong>Step 3: </strong>Touch the LMC 8.4 app icon, then click on <strong>"Storage"</strong>.</li>



<li><strong>Step 4: </strong>Then simply <strong>"clear the cache" </strong>of this apk.</li>



<li><strong>Step 5: </strong>Now, you'll be able to re-capture moments again.</li>
</ul>



<p>One more thing: along with crashing, many users sometimes face a 'green photo' problem when they capture images using this app. So, I've written a detailed guide on '<a href="https://lmc84.com.in/how-to-fix-lmc-8-4-green-photo-problem-2025-fix-guide/" data-type="link" data-id="https://lmc84.com.in/how-to-fix-lmc-8-4-green-photo-problem-2025-fix-guide/">How to Fix the Green Photo Problem of LMC 8.4 App</a>.' If you face this issue, check out the guide. I guarantee your issue will vanish.</p>

However, It is important to remember that this is not an official app, it is a mod application of Google Camera. Therefore, it should be used only after analyzing it on a personal level.</p>

<h2 class="wp-block-heading has-text-align-center h" id="fa-qs" style="font-size:36px">Frequently Asked Questions (FAQs)</h2>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-accordion alignnone"><div class="kt-accordion-wrap kt-accordion-id14_774a95-98 kt-accordion-has-5-panes kt-active-pane-0 kt-accordion-block kt-pane-header-alignment-left kt-accodion-icon-style-arrow kt-accodion-icon-side-right" style="max-width:none"><div class="kt-accordion-inner-wrap" data-allow-multiple-open="false" data-start-open="0">
<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-1 kt-pane14_02d2eb-47"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Is LMC Apk safe to use?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>Yes, the app is safe to use and you don't need to worry about data security.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-2 kt-pane14_990900-ff"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Do I need to set-up config files?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>No, it is not necessary. You can use the camera app without setting-up config files.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-3 kt-pane14_392803-a2"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Does LMC better than the stock camera?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>It depends on the device. If you have a high-end mobile then LMC can give competition &amp; on the other hand, it is better for low-end devices.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-4 kt-pane14_7ca946-0b"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Which version of LMC shall I use?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>You can use the latest version of LMC 8.4 which is the R18 for better optimized configuration.</p>
</div></div></div>



<div class="wp-block-kadence-pane kt-accordion-pane kt-accordion-pane-5 kt-pane14_a195f2-3e"><div class="kt-accordion-header-wrap"><button class="kt-blocks-accordion-header kt-acccordion-button-label-show" type="button"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title-wrap"><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-title">Who made this LMC camera?</span></span><span class="kt-blocks-accordion-icon-trigger"></span></button></div><div class="kt-accordion-panel kt-accordion-panel-hidden"><div class="kt-accordion-panel-inner">
<p>The developer of this camera is Hasli.</p>
</div></div></div>
</div></div></div>

<script data-two_delay_id="two_dispatchEvent_script"></script><script data-pagespeed-no-defer data-two-no-delay >window["two_svg_placeholder"] = "data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg%20xmlns=%22http://www.w3.org/2000/svg%22%20viewBox=%220%200%20%20%22%3E%3C/svg%3E#}"</script><script data-pagespeed-no-defer data-two-no-delay  type="text/javascript"  src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/plugins/tenweb-speed-optimizer/includes/external/js/vanilla-lazyload/lazyload.min.js"></script><script data-pagespeed-no-defer data-two-no-delay type="text/javascript" src="https://lmc84.com.in/wp-content/plugins/tenweb-speed-optimizer/includes/external/js/vanilla-lazyload/two_bg_vanilla.js"></script><script data-pagespeed-no-defer data-two-no-delay >
                                if(typeof two_lazyLoadInstance === "undefined"){
                                    window.two_lazyLoadInstance = new LazyLoad({
                                          "callback_applied": function(element, instance){
                                                                let settings = instance._settings;
                                                                var bgDataValue = element.getAttribute("data-" + settings.data_bg_multi);
                                                                if (!bgDataValue) {
                                                                    return;
                                                                }
                                                                if(window.getComputedStyle(element).getPropertyValue("background-image") !== bgDataValue) {
                                                                    let style = element.getAttribute("style");
                                                                    style += "background-image: " + bgDataValue + " !important;";
                                                                    element.setAttribute("style", style);
                                                                }
                                                            }
                                   });
                                }else{
                                     two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                }
                                window.addEventListener("scroll", function() {
                                   if(two_lazyLoadInstance.toLoadCount>0){
                                      two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                   }
                                });
                                /*
                                 * Updates lazy-load instance from every ajax request
                                 * When we use Ajax requests and get pictures back, we need to update lazy-load instance
                                 * */
                                if (window.jQuery) {
                                    jQuery.ajaxSetup({
                                            complete: function() {
                                                two_lazyLoadInstance.update();
                                            }
                                        });
                                }
                            </script></body>
